body:
Senior Motion Designer II — Mar 2021 – Present · Oakland, California, United States

Senior Motion Designer I — Oct 2018 – Feb 2021 · San Francisco, California

Full-time · 7 yrs 6 mos (company tenure)

Responsible for establishing our motion design guidelines. These guidelines were created to aide our internal and external partners in keeping our tone of voice consistent throughout marketing.

Thru lots of experimentation, iteration, and embracing our philosophy of making financial progress for all, we've landed on a motion style that feels fun, sophisticated & relatable, to compliment the modern collage aesthetic that makes our brand recognizable.

Responsible for the design and implementation of motion into our marketing, email and social media campaigns.

production: Marcel the Shell with Shoes On (early development)
body:
On-site · Los Angeles Metropolitan Area

Got to join the stop-motion legends at Chiodo Bros. for a brief but memorable stint contributing R&D animation to the early development of Marcel the Shell with Shoes On. Performed exploratory test animations helping to shape the character's movement and visual identity. A short-lived engagement, but an invaluable experience working alongside true industry veterans.
Animator on a web series for WWE.
Animator on Season 4 of Amazon’s Tumble Leaf.

Allie the alligator, is a flamingo at heart. Mingo the flamingo, however, feels differently about that. It's through this unpleasant interaction that Allie, trying to prove herself as just "one of the birds" realizes she doesn't need the approval of Mingo, or any other creature, to be true to herself.

This film would not have been possible without the amazing team that helped create it. I couldn't ask for a more talented or generous group of friends. Thank you all so much.
Animation lead for the stop motion episode of Nuts + Bolt's on Viceland. I was responsible for all character animation during the Henry Selick interview and short film segment.
Animated promotional spots for The Lego Batman Movie.
Animator on season 3 of Amazon's Tumble Leaf.
Animated on the web series "Doctor Havok," for Full Screen streaming service.
Animator on season 2 of Amazon's Tumble Leaf.
Co-directed, designed, and animated segments for "Greatest Party Story Ever" TV series on MTV.
Animation Director on "Timeless," a stop motion commercial project for McDonalds. Responsible for all aspects of the animation process.
Animation Director on a commercial project for Newman's Own. Responsible for creating and supervising all aspects of the animation process.
Animator on NBC's Elf: Buddy's Musical Christmas.
Animator on Amazon's web series "Tumbleaf."
Animator on Charlie Kaufman's animated feature film "Anomalisa."
Supervised and animated an Android project for Studio G. I was responsible for all aspects of animation.
Animator on the feature film "Hell and Back."
Animator for a Google Doodle project. Responsible for all stop motion animation, and model rigs.
Responsible for all stop motion content on the commercial "Duck Tron."
Thesis film at the Academy of Art University — directed, wrote, animated, and designed.
